TaskOperations_getTask.usage: let response = try await client.tasks.getTask(projectId: 123, taskId: 123)
TaskOperations_getTask.output: Task(id: Int, title: String, isDone: Bool?)

TaskOperations_updateTask.usage:
let body = TaskUpdateRequest(task: TaskUpdateRequestTask(title: "example", isDone: true))
let response = try await client.tasks.updateTask(projectId: 123, taskId: 123, body: body)
TaskOperations_updateTask.output: Task(id: Int, title: String, isDone: Bool?)
